x-enumeration-literals.name: Initiated
x-enumeration-literals.description: A claim request has been created and all initial documentation has been submitted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Under Review
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim is actively being assessed and verified for eligibility and accuracy.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending Approval
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim assessment is complete, but final approval is required from the insurer or bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approved
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim has been approved and is ready for payout, though payment may not yet have been issued.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejected
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim has been denied; the reason for rejection is documented.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partially Paid
x-enumeration-literals.description: A partial settlement of the claim has been issued, but some portion remains unpaid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Paid
x-enumeration-literals.description: The full claim amount has been disbursed and the claim is closed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Closed
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim has been withdrawn or voided by the initiator before completion.
